news.headline: Chinese consumers drawn to secondhand shops as spending sputters
news.summary: Surrounded by racks of used winter coats, sweaters and household appliances, Chinese shoppers browse items at a secondhand store in Shanghai looking for bargains. news.headline: 1 dead, 19 injured in blast on Bannu–Miranshah road in KP’s North Waziristan: officials
news.summary: <p>MIRANSHAH: At least one person was killed and 19 others, including two security personnel, were injured in a blast near the Chashma Sarbandki checkpost on the Bannu–Miranshah main road in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa’s North Waziristan district on Friday, police and hospital officials said.</p>

news.headline: ‘Liquor Capital of China’ Is Trying to Save Its Fortunes
news.summary: Once celebrated for its fiery spirits, the town of Maotai has reeled from a bad Chinese economy, changing tastes and a crackdown on boozy official banquets.
